summary: Verified (1) Emergent branding fully removed from app DOM and (2) new premium Alux Architectural Footer in both EN and AR. Backend: 12/12 pytest passed against live preview URL (no regressions on /api/, /api/inquiries POST/GET, /api/status, Arabic UTF-8 roundtrip). Frontend desktop (1920x4000): page title == 'Alux Architectural — Precision Crafted Brass Hardware | Aadesh Enterprise'; no #emergent-badge element; no 'Made with Emergent' / 'emergent.sh' / 'posthog' / 'emergent-main.js' strings anywhere in the rendered HTML; document.body.innerText contains no 'Emergent'/'emergent' substring; meta description references Alux Architectural / Aadesh Enterprise (no Emergent). Footer: data-testid='footer' renders; CTA block with 'Let's craft your next project' text; footer-cta-whatsapp href = https://wa.me/919099369442?text=... (correct 91 country code + 10-digit phone); footer-cta-email mailto:purnatpedhadiya2016@gmail.com; atelier phone shows '+91 9099369442', email shows purnatpedhadiya2016@gmail.com, location shows 'Mumbai · India'; all 6 nav testids present (footer-link-about/products/rods/why/experience/contact); all 4 social testids present (instagram/facebook/linkedin/youtube); footer-whatsapp tile present with correct wa.me link; footer-back-to-top present and clickable (triggers smooth scroll); 3 legal links (Privacy/Terms/Trade Policy) found in legal strip. All previously-existing testids still present (hero-explore-button, products-section, rods-section, spec-table, inquiry-form, form-submit, lang-en, lang-ar, whatsapp-float). AR mode: clicking lang-ar sets html[dir]=rtl, html[lang]=ar; AR footer CTA contains 'لنُشكّل' and 'مشروعك'; Arabic legal/designed_in strings ('صُمم...') render correctly. Mobile (390x844): no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=clientWidth=390); all footer testids present and visible; footer columns stack correctly; back-to-top + legal links remain visible.

minor.issue: Pre-existing (carried from iter 1-3): exception handler references `logger` before module-level definition — relies on lazy name resolution.
Pre-existing: allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' violates CORS spec.

critical_code_review_comments: Footer.jsx: 4 social icon anchors all point to href='#' — once real social URLs exist they should be wired; currently clicking them will scroll to top / no-op which is acceptable placeholder behavior.

Footer.jsx: 3 legal links (Privacy/Terms/Trade Policy) also href='#'. Works visually but no data-testid on the anchors makes them harder to target; consider data-testid='footer-legal-{privacy|terms|trade}'.

Footer.jsx: WhatsApp URL computed as `wa.me/91${PHONE}` where PHONE='9099369442' — this correctly yields wa.me/919099369442 but the `91` literal-in-template is easy to miss; consider a single COUNTRY_CODE constant.
Pre-existing carry-overs (not related to this iteration): GET /api/inquiries has no auth — leaks PII; translations.js is ~560 lines and could be split per section for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all checked testids + no-branding checks + EN/AR + mobile)

seed_data_creation: None new in this iteration. Prior TEST_-prefixed inquiry rows remain in MongoDB 'inquiries' collection from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Emergent branding cleanup + Footer redesign verified clean against https://architectural-metal.preview.emergentagent.com. Note: platform-level iframe chrome around the preview URL (if any) is outside the app and not asserted. New footer testids added this iteration: footer, footer-cta, footer-cta-whatsapp, footer-cta-email, footer-phone, footer-email, footer-location, footer-link-{about|products|rods|why|experience|contact}, footer-social-{instagram|facebook|linkedin|youtube}, footer-whatsapp, footer-back-to-top. No data-testids yet on the 3 legal links (Privacy/Terms/Trade Policy) — target by text if needed. CTA WhatsApp link format: https://wa.me/919099369442?text=<urlencoded>. Backend: 12 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_alux_api.py.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions. Emergent references fully stripped from /app/frontend/public/index.html (no emergent-badge div, no posthog, no emergent-main.js script, custom favicon/title/meta). New Footer.jsx renders i18n-driven CTA + atelier + navigate + collection + follow columns + legal strip, with correct data-testids and working EN/AR translations via useI18n(). All target acceptance criteria from the review request pass.
